Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment

Class ChainedPunishment

java.lang.Object
de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment.AbstractPunishment
de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment.AbstractTemporalPunishment
de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment.ChainedPunishment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Punishment, TemporalPunishment, ReasonHolder
public class ChainedPunishment extends AbstractTemporalPunishment

  • Method Details

    • getReason

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component getReason()
      Description copied from interface: ReasonHolder
      Gets the reason of this punishment. All placeholders will be replaced with their actual values.
      Specified by:
      getReason in interface ReasonHolder
      Overrides:
      getReason in class AbstractTemporalPunishment
      Returns:
      the reason of this punishment as as component

    • of

      public static ChainedPunishment of(TemporalPunishment last, AbstractNecrifyPlugin plugin)

    • getType

      @NotNull public @NotNull StandardPunishmentType getType()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Returns the type of this punishment. By default, this is a field from StandardPunishmentType.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface Punishment
      Specified by:
      getType in class AbstractTemporalPunishment
      Returns:
      the type of this punishment
      See Also:
      • StandardPunishmentType

    • isPermanent

      public boolean isPermanent()
      Description copied from interface: TemporalPunishment
      Whether or not this punishment is permanent. This is equivalent to getDuration().isPermanent().
      Returns:
      true if the punishment is permanent, otherwise false
      See Also:
      • PunishmentDuration.isPermanent()

    • createFullReason

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component createFullReason(@Nullable @Nullable Locale locale)
      Description copied from interface: ReasonHolder
      Creates the full reason inclusive when the ban ends (or that the ban is permanent).
      Parameters:
      locale - the locale to use for the reason (or null for the default locale); current behavior is not using this.
      Returns:
      the full reason with all information.
